zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche於1145年出生時，她的父親Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet25歲，母親Adelaide de Vendôme25歲。她於大約1170年與Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1211年12月在法國艾-吉洛易a奧度享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche于1145年出生时，她的父亲Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet25岁，母亲Adelaide de Vendôme25岁。她于大约1170年与Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1211年12月在法国艾-吉洛易a奧度享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: sur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Abha, Amit, Gopa, Partha, Prabhat, Sandip, Sanjiv, Shakti, Shyama, Sonali, Sumana, Sumit.  Korean Chae, Jin, Jong, Kheng, Ki Suk, Soon, Sun Kyu, Wan.
German: variant of   Sauer  .
Indian (West Bengal) and Bangladeshi: nickname from Sanskrit šūra ‘brave’.

variants.name: Sauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Heinz, Otto, Achim, Dieter, Erwin, Hans, Helmut, Reinhold, Erna, Florian, Fritz.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for an embittered or cantankerous person, from Middle High German sūr, German sauer ‘sour’. In Jewish families, it is mainly artificial, assigned at random by Austrian clerks. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia.
Czech and Slovenian (Šauer): from German Schauer . In Slovenia, it is in part of Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) origin.

nameMeanings.name: Claise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Dominique, Edrice, Evens, Guerline, Jean-Claude, Kettly, Marthe, Monique, Murielle, Serge, Yves.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Blaise, from Latin Blasius . Compare Blaize 1.
Scottish (Ayrshire and Bute): variant of   Blaize   2.

variants.name: Blaes
meanings: German (Saarland; also Bläs): from a French-influenced (see Blaise ) vernacular form of the personal name Blasius . Compare Blas .
Dutch: variant of   Blees  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Blaize
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Blaise   1. In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (Finistère).
English (Staffordshire): from Middle English blase, blese, bleis ‘torch, firebrand’, perhaps also used for a torch maker or bearer.
English (Staffordshire): alternatively, a variant of   Bloise  .

variants.name: Blais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Normand, Andre, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Gilles, Julien, Michel, Yvon, Alphonse.
French: variant of   Blaise  . Compare   Blair   and   Blay  .

History: Pierre Blais from Hanc in Deux-Sèvres, France, married first Anne Perrault in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1669, and second Élisabeth Royer in Saint-Jean, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1689. — In North America, this surname was originally also a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by Joseph Tousignant dit Blais, a descendant of Pierre Tousignant (see Tousignant ). He married Marie Charpentier in Baie-du-Febvre, QC, in 1835.

variants.name: Blaze
meanings: English: variant of   Blaise   2. See also   Blaize   2.

variants.name: Blasius
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ettore, Dante, Enrico, Giancarlo, Gildo, Guido, Marino, Mauro.
Italian (Tuscany): patronymic or plural form of the personal name Biagio, from Latin Blasius .

variants.name: Blease
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): probably a variant of   Blaise  .

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Jean .

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche was born in 1145, her father, Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet, was 25 and her mother, Adelaide de Vendôme, was 25. She married Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun about 1170. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in December 1211, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche est née en 1145, son père, Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Vendôme, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en décembre 1211, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche 1145 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet 25 und ihre Mutter Adelaide de Vendôme 25. Sie hat um 1170 Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Dezember 1211 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche è nata il nel 1145, sua padre, Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Adelaide de Vendôme, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1211, nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guercheが1145年に生まれた時，父Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchetは25歳，母Adelaide de Vendômeは25歳であった。約1170年にHugh VI Viscount of Châteaudunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1211年12月にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche(이)가 1145년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide de Vendôme(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1211년 12월 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche nasceu em 1145, seu pai, Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Vendôme, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1211, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche родилась в 1145 г., её отцу по имени Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Vendôme, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun около 1170 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла декабрь 1211 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche nació en 1145, su papá, Gosbert de Preuilly Seigneur de Bouchet, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Vendôme, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1211, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
